subject: Re: Installation requirements - is windows OS a requirement
body:
Hi Petya,

sorry, I'm afraid it's Windows only due to the UI framework used. If you 
want to try it but don't have access to a Windows machine, there's Michael's 
Amazon Cloud guide <http://cryoem-tools.cloud/warp-aws/>.

Cheers,
Dimitry


On Sunday, November 11, 2018 at 9:48:43 PM UTC+1, pvk2@cornell.edu wrote:
>
> Hello, 
>
> Can Warp be installed on Linux GPU workstation, i.e. without a Windows 
> operating system?
>
> Thanks in advance, 
>
> Petya
>
